calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and for a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Visio #12353

Petitioner Liu Mei Cao present in pro per for self and as guardian ad litme for the minor Wan Ying Hu. Minor's father Guang Hua Hu also present in pro per and consented and signed the petition for the name change of the minor in open court.
Parties were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Melissa Liu Mei Cao and change name of the minor to Angela Wan Ying Hu.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
